events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes an electrical termination/splice that is roughed-in but shows insufficient torque detected via thermal signature (IR modality). This indicates a loose connection causing heating, which is a defect. NEC 110.14 requires terminations to be properly made. Insufficient torque = non-compliant and installed-defective. Risk is high because loose connections can cause fires/arcing. Decision should be fail.
